Group 1 winner; 2nd in Huxley Stakes and Curragh recently May 2026; strong form; home advantage

Group 1 placed; 4th in Jockey Club Stakes G2 recently; progressive form
Mare; won Middleton Fillies' Stakes G2 last time out; recent strong form
